contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Bounded AWS backup storage: pruned 1.47TB, retired redundant DB snapshot job, monthly janitor
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/40
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/343
  
  Details:
  Addressed unbounded backup-storage growth in the Nelanco AWS account (62 EBS snapshots / 4,164 GiB + 41 AMIs, much of it unpruned 2021-2024 manual images and a never-pruned monthly data-volume snapshot job). Per operator decisions: (1) retired the EBS-only monthly DB snapshot workflow (snapshot_databases.yml deleted, script deprecation-bannered) since the new monthly DB AMI captures each data volume too; (2) auto-delete everything older than 2 years. Built scripts/aws/prune_aws_backups.py + .github/workflows/prune_aws_backups.yml in Cypher-Defense: keeps newest 2 legacy monthly EBS snapshots per codebase, deregisters AMIs older than 730 days and deletes their freed snapshots, and deletes orphaned snapshots backing already-deleted AMIs; dry-run default, recomputes the kept-AMI backing snapshot set after deregistration so no snapshot backing a retained AMI is ever deleted; runs monthly on the 2nd after the 1st-of-month AMI backups, reusing the existing CYPHER_DEFENCE_AWS secrets. First run (via the audited GitHub Action) deregistered 27 AMIs and deleted 36 snapshots, reclaiming ~1,474 GiB: Nelanco snapshots 62->26 (4,164->2,690 GiB), AMIs 41->14; the two current DB AMIs and all kept-AMI backing snapshots were correctly protected. All three backup scripts (autopilot AMI retain 8, DB AMI retain 6, this janitor) now bound storage going forward.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
